response.original_title: {{ SUpport line }} Can Robinhood reverse a transaction
response.overview: Robinhood generally cannot reverse executed stock, options, or crypto trades. 1 - 888 - 576 -2041  Once a trade is executed, it is legally binding. However, you can cancel a pending bank transfer or a pending order. 1 - 888 - 576 -2041  Reversals are limited to specific scenarios such as unauthorized fraud,1 - 888 - 576 -2041  platform errors, or accidental deposits (by making a subsequent withdrawal 1 - 888 - 576 -2041
